name: Black Spade Acquisition III Co
summary: Black Spade Acquisition III Co (BIII) is a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company formed for the purpose of completing an initial business combination. The company completed its initial public offering on January 7, 2026, issuing units consisting of Class A ordinary shares and warrants. It has not yet identified or completed a business combination and operates within a defined completion window of 24-27 months from IPO closing.

products.name: Units
products.description: IPO units each consisting of one Class A ordinary share and one-third of a public warrant, sold to raise capital for a business combination.

products.name: Private Placement Warrants
products.description: Warrants issued to sponsor and underwriters at $0.50 per warrant, exercisable to purchase one Class A ordinary share at $11.50 per share.

partnerships.description: Cayman Islands limited liability company serving as sponsor, holding founder shares and providing potential working capital loans.
